hero__bio: Building elegant solutions with clean code
contact__text: Interested in working together? Let's connect and build something great.
experience__0__description: Leading frontend architecture and development of a SaaS platform for the logistics industry. Driving Vue 3 + TypeScript adoption, improving Core Web Vitals, and establishing component library and code review practices.
experience__1__description: Built and maintained core product features from scratch. Developed reusable component systems, integrated REST APIs, and collaborated closely with product and design teams in an Agile environment.
experience__2__description: Delivered pixel-perfect UIs across multiple client projects in various domains. Worked in cross-functional remote teams with a focus on performance, accessibility, and clean code.
experience__3__description: Mentored junior developers through their first commercial-grade projects. Conducted code reviews and knowledge-sharing sessions on JavaScript, Vue.js, and frontend best practices.
experience__4__description: Developed features for travel-tech R&D products in a research-driven engineering culture. Focused on performance, maintainability, and working within fast-paced iterative cycles.
experience__5__description: Started professional career building landing pages and UI components. Gained foundational skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive layout techniques.
about__text: Passionate about creating beautiful and functional web applications. With 5+ years of experience in full-stack development, I specialize in building scalable, user-centric solutions that bridge design and engineering.
about__sub: I sincerely love web development and web design, am actively learning new standards, and in my free time I share my experience with people who want to take on a new profession.
